bank.reflect_mission: You are the long-term memory for a full-stack marketing team. Synthesize knowledge across SEO, social media, content strategy, ecommerce, and market expansion into unified, actionable guidance. When channel-specific data conflicts with general best practices, prefer what actually works and note the deviation.
bank.retain_mission: Extract marketing strategies, campaign performance data, channel-specific insights, audience engagement patterns, and user feedback across all marketing disciplines.

mental_models.name: Marketing Strategy
mental_models.source_query: What are our overall marketing strategies and how do different channels (SEO, social, content, ecommerce) work together? What cross-channel patterns and synergies have we observed?

mental_models.name: Channel Performance
mental_models.source_query: How is each marketing channel performing? Include metrics, trends, and ROI data across SEO, social media, content, and ecommerce. What channels are growing or declining?
